title: Lead Instructional Designer at Navneet Education

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Navneet Education
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Navneet Education. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Jodhpur-based team.

About Navneet Education:
Navneet Education is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navneet Education!
